description_en: The Muryoji Temple grove is a Natural Monument in the Monuments category of Japanese cultural properties. It is municipally designated by Hokota City. It is located in Tosu.

description_en: This standing bronze statue of Amida Nyorai (Amitabha Buddha) is a sculpture in the Tangible Cultural Property category. It is municipally designated by Koga City.

name_romaji: Hondayama iseki shutsudo Chōroku gonen mei kondei itabi
